blocks.content: This post has **"hide": true** in the manifest, so it won't appear in the blog listing or homepage preview. But you can still access it directly via the URL.

blocks.text: Use `"hide": true` for draft posts, private notes, or unpublished content.
Add `?post=draft-post` to the blog page URL to view this post directly: `pages/blog.html?post=draft-post`
